ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon species */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation of the Pokémon */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience gained from defeating the Pokémon */,
  "type_1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type_2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon (if any) */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Hit Points (HP) of the Pokémon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack points of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense points of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed points of the Pokémon */,
  "special_attack" INTEGER /* Special attack points of the Pokémon */,
  "special_defense" INTEGER /* Special defense points of the Pokémon */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Primary and secondary abilities of the Pokémon */,
  "hidden_ability" TEXT /* Hidden ability of the Pokémon */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female Pokémon */,
  "egg_groups" TEXT /* Egg groups the Pokémon belongs to */,
  "hatch_counter" INTEGER /* Number of steps required to hatch the Pokémon from an egg */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Capture rate of the Pokémon */,
  "base_happiness" INTEGER /* Base happiness of the Pokémon */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the Pokémon */,
  "egg_cycles" INTEGER /* Number of egg cycles required for the Pokémon to hatch */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the Pokémon */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the Pokémon */,
  "flavor_text" TEXT /* Description or flavor text of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., steel, fire) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_effectiveness" TEXT /* JSON object storing type effectiveness */,
  "resistance" TEXT /* JSON object storing resistances */,
  "weakness" TEXT /* JSON object storing weaknesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the generation was released */,
  "version_group" TEXT /* Version group of the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution record */,
  "base_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base Pokémon species */,
  "evolution_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolved Pokémon species */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, trade) */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon evolves */,
  "evolution_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required for evolution (if any) */,
  "evolution_happiness" INTEGER /* Happiness level required for evolution (if any) */,
  "evolution_time" TEXT /* Time of day required for evolution (if any) */,
  "evolution_gender" TEXT /* Gender required for evolution (if any) */,
  "evolution_peacefully" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon must be peaceful for evolution (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolution_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_base_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_species_id") REFERENCES species ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolution_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_species_id") REFERENCES species ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated in the battle */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon used by the user */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent Pokémon */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, lose) */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "battle_type" TEXT /* Type of battle (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the battle took place */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the battle in minutes */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the Pokémon used in the battle */,
  "opponent_level" INTEGER /* Level of the opponent Pokémon */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the battle */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain conditions during the battle */,
  "item_used" TEXT /* Item used by the Pokémon in the battle (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES species ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES species ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles fought by this Pokémon */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "average_hp" REAL /* Average HP during battles */,
  "average_attack" REAL /* Average attack points during battles */,
  "average_defense" REAL /* Average defense points during battles */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed points during battles */,
  "average_special_attack" REAL /* Average special attack points during battles */,
  "average_special_defense" REAL /* Average special defense points during battles */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate (percentage) of the Pokémon */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Loss rate (percentage) of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES species ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the item on Pokémon */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item in the game currency */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "obtain_method" TEXT /* Method to obtain the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_items" (
  "user_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user item record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item owned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned by the user */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the item was last used */,
  "obtained_date" TEXT /* Date and time the item was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_items_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles participated in by the user */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the user */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
